nasb.text: and they said to him, “Thus says Jephthah, ‘Israel did not take away the land of Moab nor the land of the sons of Ammon.

esv.text: and said to him, “Thus says Jephthah: Israel did not take away the land of Moab or the land of the Ammonites,

cnv.text: 對他說：“耶弗他這樣說：‘以色列人並沒有奪取過摩押地和亞捫人的土地。

ccb.text: 对他说：“以色列人并没有占据摩押和亚扪的土地。
